message:
feat(connectors): 59 FCP2 connector manifest definitions

Add manifest.toml definitions covering the full FCP2 connector ecosystem.
Each manifest declares connector identity, archetypes, capabilities,
operations with safety tiers, network constraints (host allowlists,
response size limits), rate limit pools, event subscriptions, and state
model (singleton_writer, append_only, etc.).

Includes manifests for 39 manifest-only connectors (1password, algolia,
amplitude, arxiv, asana, bigquery, bitbucket, bitwarden, box, clickup,
cron, datadog, docusign, dropbox, duckdb, elasticsearch, evernote,
gitlab, grafana, homeassistant, hubspot, intercom, kubernetes, linkedin,
logseq, mailchimp, make, mcp-bridge, metabase, mixpanel, monday,
mongodb, n8n, pandadoc, posthog, pulumi, reddit, retool, roam,
salesforce, segment, semanticscholar, sendgrid, sentry, snowflake,
spotify, terraform, todoist, trello, webhook-receiver, zapier) plus
manifests for the 20 connectors with full source implementations
(browser, google-ai, microsoft365, pinecone, plaid, qdrant, youtube,
zendesk, and the previously committed connectors).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,360 @@
+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:f3f91e4706aab252c83245d812992d6e4cdf591d5c2d7721b180139e5d06d06f"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.1password"
+name = "1Password Connector"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "FCP connector for 1Password secret management (vaults, items, documents)"
+archetypes = ["knowledge"]
+format = "wasi"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "singleton_writer"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "Stores service account token and vault access cache."
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:private"
+allowed_sources = [
+    "z:owner",
+    "z:private",
+]
+allowed_targets = ["z:private"]
+forbidden = [
+    "z:public",
+    "z:community",
+    "z:work",
+]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = [
+    "network.dns",
+    "network.egress",
+    "network.tls.sni",
+    "storage.state",
+]
+optional = []
+forbidden = [
+    "system.exec",
+    "network.listen",
+    "media.upload",
+    "media.download",
+]
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.create"]
+description = "Create a new item in a vault"
+capability = "1password.items.write"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.create".input_schema]
+required = [
+    "vault_id",
+    "category",
+    "title",
+]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.create".input_schema.properties.category]
+description = "LOGIN, PASSWORD, SECURE_NOTE, API_CREDENTIAL, etc."
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.create".input_schema.properties.fields]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.create".input_schema.properties.title]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.create".input_schema.properties.vault_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.create".output_schema]
+required = ["id"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.create".output_schema.properties.id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.create".network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "*.1password.com",
+    "*.b5dev.com",
+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.create".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Create a new secret item in 1Password."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = ['{"vault_id": "abc123", "category": "API_CREDENTIAL", "title": "Stripe Key", "fields": [{"label": "api_key", "value": "sk_live_..."}]}']
+related = [
+    "1password.items.list",
+    "1password.items.delete",
+]
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.delete"]
+description = "Delete an item from a vault"
+capability = "1password.items.write"
+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"
+requires_approval = "interactive"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.delete".input_schema]
+required = [
+    "vault_id",
+    "item_id",
+]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.delete".input_schema.properties.item_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.delete".input_schema.properties.vault_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.delete".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.delete".network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "*.1password.com",
+    "*.b5dev.com",
+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.delete".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Delete a secret item. Cannot be undone."
+common_mistakes = ["Deleting items that other services depend on for credentials."]
+examples = ['{"vault_id": "abc123", "item_id": "def456"}']
+related = ["1password.items.get"]
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.get"]
+description = "Get a single item with field values"
+capability = "1password.items.read"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.get".input_schema]
+required = [
+    "vault_id",
+    "item_id",
+]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.get".input_schema.properties.item_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.get".input_schema.properties.vault_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.get".output_schema]
+required = ["item"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.get".output_schema.properties.item]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.get".network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "*.1password.com",
+    "*.b5dev.com",
+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.get".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Retrieve a specific item including secret field values. Use with caution."
+common_mistakes = ["Logging or caching secret values — treat all field values as sensitive."]
+examples = ['{"vault_id": "abc123", "item_id": "def456"}']
+related = ["1password.items.list"]
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.list"]
+description = "List items in a vault"
+capability = "1password.items.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.list".input_schema]
+required = ["vault_id"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.list".input_schema.properties.vault_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.list".output_schema]
+required = ["items"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.list".output_schema.properties.items]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.list".network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "*.1password.com",
+    "*.b5dev.com",
+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations."1password.items.list".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "List items in a 1Password vault (without revealing secrets)."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = ['{"vault_id": "abc123"}']
+related = [
+    "1password.vaults.list",
+    "1password.items.get",
+]
+
+[provides.operations."1password.vaults.list"]
+description = "List vaults accessible to the service account"
+capability = "1password.vaults.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.vaults.list".input_schema]
+required = []
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.vaults.list".output_schema]
+required = ["vaults"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.vaults.list".output_schema.properties.vaults]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."1password.vaults.list".network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "*.1password.com",
+    "*.b5dev.com",
+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."1password.vaults.list".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "List available vaults."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = ["{}"]
+related = ["1password.items.list"]
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 128
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 120000
+fs_readonly_paths = [
+    "/usr",
+    "/lib",
+]
+fs_writable_paths = ["$CONNECTOR_STATE"]
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
+
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "1password.vaults.read"
+requests = 100
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 10
+scope = "instance"
+
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "1password.items.read"
+requests = 200
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 20
+scope = "instance"
+
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "1password.items.write"
+requests = 50
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 5
+scope = "instance"
+
+[rate_limits.operation_pools]
+"1password.vaults.list" = ["1password.vaults.read"]
+"1password.items.list" = ["1password.items.read"]
+"1password.items.create" = ["1password.items.write"]
+"1password.items.get" = ["1password.items.read"]
+"1password.items.delete" = ["1password.items.write"]

+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.algolia"

+archetypes = ["knowledge"]

+[connector.state]

+[zones]

+allowed_sources = [
+    "z:owner",

+]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+forbidden = [
+    "z:public",
+    "z:community",

+
+[capabilities]
+required = [
+    "network.dns",
+    "network.egress",
+    "network.tls.sni",

+[provides.operations."algolia.indices.list"]

+[provides.operations."algolia.indices.list".network_constraints]

+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 5000
+total_timeout_ms = 15000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations."algolia.indices.list".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "List Algolia search indices."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = ["{}"]
+related = ["algolia.search"]
+
+[provides.operations."algolia.records.delete"]
+description = "Delete a record"

+[provides.operations."algolia.records.delete".input_schema.properties.index_name]

+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true

+
+[provides.operations."algolia.records.get".output_schema.properties.objectID]

+
+[provides.operations."algolia.records.get".network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "*.algolia.net",
+    "*.algolianet.com",

+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 5000
+total_timeout_ms = 10000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."algolia.records.get".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Get a specific record by its objectID."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = ['{"index_name": "products", "object_id": "abc123"}']
+related = ["algolia.search"]
+
+[provides.operations."algolia.search"]
+description = "Search an index"
+capability = "algolia.search.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."algolia.search".input_schema]
+required = [
+    "index_name",
+    "query",
+]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."algolia.search".input_schema.properties.hits_per_page]
+maximum = 1000
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."algolia.search".input_schema.properties.index_name]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."algolia.search".input_schema.properties.query]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."algolia.search".output_schema]
+required = ["hits"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."algolia.search".output_schema.properties.hits]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."algolia.search".network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "*.algolia.net",
+    "*.algolianet.com",
+]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 5000
+total_timeout_ms = 10000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations."algolia.search".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Search for records in an Algolia index."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = ['{"index_name": "products", "query": "laptop", "hits_per_page": 20}']
+related = [
+    "algolia.indices.list",
+    "algolia.records.get",
+]
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 256
+cpu_percent = 50
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 300000
+fs_readonly_paths = [
+    "/usr",
+    "/lib",
+]
+fs_writable_paths = ["$CONNECTOR_STATE"]
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
+
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "algolia.indices.read"
+requests = 100
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 10
+scope = "instance"
+
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "algolia.search.read"
+requests = 500
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 50
+scope = "instance"
+
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "algolia.records.read"
+requests = 200
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 20
+scope = "instance"
+
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "algolia.records.write"
+requests = 50
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 10
+scope = "instance"
+
+[rate_limits.operation_pools]
+"algolia.records.get" = ["algolia.records.read"]
+"algolia.records.delete" = ["algolia.records.write"]

+[zones]

+]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+forbidden = [
+    "z:public",
+    "z:community",
+]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = [
+    "network.dns",
+    "network.egress",

+[manifest]

+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.arxiv"
+name = "arXiv Connector"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "FCP connector for arXiv (paper search, metadata, PDF access, citation graph, author info, category classification, new paper monitoring)"
+archetypes = [
+    "knowledge",
+    "operational",
+    "streaming",
+]
+format = "wasi"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "singleton_writer"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "Stores monitor cursors for new-paper polling, bounded metadata cache (max 50 MB), and last-seen paper timestamps per category."
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = [
+    "z:owner",
+    "z:private",
+    "z:work",
+]
+allowed_targets = [

+    "z:private",
+]
+forbidden = [

+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:9d598f8320f1d425528d303083f34a08a91b2c5392fd38f2fbbeade48f9023da"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.browser"
+name = "Browser Connector"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "FCP connector for headless browser automation — navigation, screenshots, extraction, form interaction, JS evaluation"
+archetypes = ["operational"]
+format = "wasi"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "singleton_writer"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "Stores session cookies, browser profile state, and page cache metadata."
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = [
+    "z:owner",
+    "z:private",
+    "z:work",
+]
+allowed_targets = [
+    "z:work",
+    "z:private",
+]
+forbidden = [
+    "z:public",
+    "z:community",
+]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = [
+    "network.dns",
+    "network.egress",
+    "network.tls.sni",
+    "storage.state",
+    "media.download",
+]
+optional = ["media.upload"]
+forbidden = [
+    "system.exec",
+    "network.listen",
+]
+
+[provides.operations."browser.click"]
+description = "Click an element identified by CSS selector"
+capability = "browser.interact"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.click".input_schema]
+required = ["selector"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.click".input_schema.properties.selector]
+description = "CSS selector for the element to click"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.click".input_schema.properties.timeout_ms]
+default = 5000
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.click".output_schema]
+required = ["clicked"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.click".output_schema.properties.clicked]
+type = "boolean"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.click".output_schema.properties.navigation_url]
+description = "New URL if click caused navigation"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.click".network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "*.github.com",
+    "*.google.com",
+    "*.wikipedia.org",
+    "*.amazonaws.com",
+]
+port_allow = [
+    80,
+    443,
+]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 10
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations."browser.click".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Click a button, link, or interactive element on the page."
+common_mistakes = ["Clicking before element is visible/interactable."]
+examples = ['{"selector": "button.submit"}']
+related = [
+    "browser.fill_form",
+    "browser.wait_for_selector",
+]
+
+[provides.operations."browser.evaluate_js"]
+description = "Execute JavaScript in the page context and return the result"
+capability = "browser.execute"
+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"
+requires_approval = "interactive"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.evaluate_js".input_schema]
+required = ["expression"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.evaluate_js".input_schema.properties.expression]
+description = "JavaScript expression to evaluate"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.evaluate_js".output_schema]
+required = ["result"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.evaluate_js".output_schema.properties.result]
+description = "JSON-serialized return value"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.evaluate_js".network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "*.github.com",
+    "*.google.com",
+    "*.wikipedia.org",
+    "*.amazonaws.com",
+]
+port_allow = [
+    80,
+    443,
+]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations."browser.evaluate_js".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Execute arbitrary JavaScript in page context. Dangerous — use only when extraction or interaction APIs are insufficient."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Injecting untrusted user input into expressions (XSS risk).",
+    "Returning non-serializable objects (Promises, DOM nodes).",
+]
+examples = ['{"expression": "document.title"}']

+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:ead666d257eb3973012a094b983470688454351b80c43a3a447ce6975db5e356"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.clickup"
+name = "ClickUp Connector"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "FCP connector for ClickUp project management (spaces, lists, tasks)"
+archetypes = [
+    "knowledge",
+    "operational",
+]
+format = "wasi"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "singleton_writer"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "Stores personal API token."
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = [
+    "z:owner",
+    "z:private",
+    "z:work",
+]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+forbidden = [
+    "z:public",
+    "z:community",
+]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = [
+    "network.dns",
+    "network.egress",
+    "network.tls.sni",
+    "storage.state",
+]
+optional = []
+forbidden = [
+    "system.exec",
+    "network.listen",
+    "media.upload",
+    "media.download",
+]
+
+[provides.operations."clickup.lists.list"]

+[provides.operations."clickup.lists.list".output_schema.properties.lists]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."clickup.lists.list".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.clickup.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760

+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:122f51ca25f7d300fe39349a2c90c3d6d2458d04ebb387050bf4312c913df71f"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.docusign"
+name = "DocuSign Connector"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "FCP connector for DocuSign eSignature (envelopes, recipients, templates, document download, Connect webhooks)"
+archetypes = [
+    "operational",
+    "streaming",
+]
+format = "wasi"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "singleton_writer"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "Stores webhook idempotency keys, envelope status tracking cursors, and Connect event checkpoints."
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = [
+    "z:owner",
+    "z:private",
+    "z:work",
+]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+forbidden = [
+    "z:public",
+    "z:community",
+]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = [
+    "network.dns",
+    "network.egress",
+    "network.tls.sni",
+    "storage.state",
+    "media.download",
+]
+optional = []
+forbidden = [
+    "system.exec",
+    "network.listen",
+]
+
+[provides.operations."docusign.add_recipients"]
+description = "Add or modify recipients on a draft envelope"
+capability = "docusign.write"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "strict"

+
+[provides.operations."docusign.add_recipients".input_schema.properties.envelope_id]
+description = "Envelope ID to modify"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."docusign.add_recipients".input_schema.properties.recipients]

+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."docusign.add_recipients".output_schema]
+required = ["recipients"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."docusign.add_recipients".output_schema.properties.recipients]

+

+host_allow = [

+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true

+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576

+[provides.operations."docusign.add_recipients".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Add or update recipients on a draft envelope before sending."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Adding recipients to an already-sent envelope (use correct recipients endpoint).",
+    "Not specifying routingOrder for sequential signing.",
+]
+examples = ['{"account_id": "abc-123", "envelope_id": "env-456", "recipients": {"signers": [{"email": "bob@example.com", "name": "Bob", "recipientId": "2", "routingOrder": "2"}]}}']

+host_allow = [

+port_allow = [443]

+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3

+
+[provides.operations."docusign.create_envelope".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Create a new envelope to send documents for signature."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Setting status='sent' without confirming with the user first — this immediately sends to recipients.",
+    "Not base64-encoding document content in the envelope definition.",
+    "Missing required recipient tabs (signature/initial positions).",
+]
+examples = ['{"account_id": "abc-123", "envelope_definition": {"emailSubject": "Please sign", "documents": [{"documentId": "1", "name": "contract.pdf", "documentBase64": "..."}], "recipients": {"signers": [{"email": "signer@example.com", "name": "Alice", "recipientId": "1"}]}, "status": "created"}}']
+related = [

+[provides.operations."docusign.download_documents"]

+

+host_allow = [

+    "*.docusign.com",

+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true

+dns_max_ips = 16

+examples = ['{"account_id": "abc-123", "envelope_id": "env-456"}']

+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:6eb01b8236ab052ad9dc2581aef63fb197d1d004aaf6efff6913dbd610e1963f"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.dropbox"
+name = "Dropbox Connector"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "FCP connector for Dropbox file storage (files, folders, sharing)"
+archetypes = [
+    "knowledge",
+    "storage",
+]
+format = "wasi"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "singleton_writer"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "Stores OAuth2 access and refresh tokens."
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = [
+    "z:owner",
+    "z:private",
+    "z:work",
+]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+forbidden = [
+    "z:public",
+    "z:community",
+]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = [
+    "network.dns",
+    "network.egress",
+    "network.tls.sni",
+    "storage.state",
+]
+optional = ["media.download"]
+forbidden = [
+    "system.exec",
+    "network.listen",
+    "media.upload",
+]
+

+[[rate_limits.pools]]

+burst = 10
+scope = "instance"

+[rate_limits.operation_pools]

+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:1145ffb1651f1701096e4a583a1a9f70984a131e89452458c7773e35fef23318"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.homeassistant"
+name = "Home Assistant Connector"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "FCP connector for Home Assistant (entity state, service calls, automations, scenes, history, event subscriptions)"
+archetypes = [
+    "knowledge",
+    "operational",
+    "streaming",
+]
+format = "wasi"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "singleton_writer"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "Stores WebSocket subscription IDs, event cursor timestamps, and bounded entity state cache (max 10 MB)."
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:infra"
+allowed_sources = [
+    "z:owner",
+    "z:private",
+    "z:work",
+    "z:infra",
+]
+allowed_targets = [
+    "z:infra",
+    "z:work",
+]
+forbidden = [
+    "z:public",
+    "z:community",
+]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = [
+    "network.dns",
+    "network.egress",
+    "network.tls.sni",
+    "storage.state",
+]
+optional = ["network.tls.mtls"]
+forbidden = [
+    "system.exec",
+    "network.listen",
+    "media.download",
+]
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.activate_scene"]
+description = "Activate a scene (apply a predefined set of entity states)"
+capability = "homeassistant.control"
+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "interactive"
+idempotency = "best_effort"
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.activate_scene".input_schema]
+required = ["entity_id"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.activate_scene".input_schema.properties.entity_id]
+description = "Scene entity ID (e.g., 'scene.movie_night')"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.activate_scene".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.activate_scene".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["$ha_host"]
+port_allow = [
+    443,
+    8123,
+]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = false
+deny_private_ranges = false
+deny_tailnet_ranges = false
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = false
+require_host_canonicalization = false
+dns_max_ips = 4
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.activate_scene".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Activate a scene to set multiple entities to predefined states at once."
+common_mistakes = ["Activating scenes that control security-sensitive devices (locks, alarms) without confirmation."]
+examples = ['{"entity_id": "scene.movie_night"}']
+related = [
+    "homeassistant.list_scenes",
+    "homeassistant.call_service",
+]
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.call_service"]
+description = "Call a Home Assistant service (turn on/off lights, lock doors, set thermostats, etc.)"
+capability = "homeassistant.control"
+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "interactive"
+idempotency = "best_effort"
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.call_service".input_schema]
+required = [
+    "domain",
+    "service",
+]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.call_service".input_schema.properties.domain]
+description = "Service domain (e.g., 'light', 'switch', 'climate', 'lock', 'cover')"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.call_service".input_schema.properties.service]
+description = "Service name (e.g., 'turn_on', 'turn_off', 'toggle', 'set_temperature')"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.call_service".input_schema.properties.service_data]
+description = "Service-specific parameters (e.g., brightness, temperature, color)"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.call_service".input_schema.properties.target]
+description = "Target entities, areas, or devices"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.call_service".output_schema]
+required = ["result"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.call_service".output_schema.properties.result]
+description = "Service call result (may be empty for fire-and-forget services)"
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.call_service".output_schema.properties.result.items]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.call_service".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["$ha_host"]
+port_allow = [
+    443,
+    8123,
+]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = false
+deny_private_ranges = false
+deny_tailnet_ranges = false
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = false
+require_host_canonicalization = false
+dns_max_ips = 4
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 5242880
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.call_service".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Control physical devices by calling Home Assistant services. This is the primary way to interact with devices."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Using set_state instead of call_service for physical devices.",
+    "Not specifying target when the service requires entity_id, area_id, or device_id.",
+    "Calling services on unavailable entities.",
+]
+examples = [
+    '{"domain": "light", "service": "turn_on", "service_data": {"brightness_pct": 75}, "target": {"entity_id": "light.living_room"}}',
+    '{"domain": "climate", "service": "set_temperature", "service_data": {"temperature": 22}, "target": {"entity_id": "climate.thermostat"}}',
+]
+related = [
+    "homeassistant.list_services",
+    "homeassistant.get_state",
+]
+
+[provides.operations."homeassistant.get_history"]
+description = "Get state history for entities over a time period"

+[manifest]

+[connector]
+id = "fcp.hubspot"
+name = "HubSpot Connector"

+description = "FCP connector for HubSpot CRM and marketing platform (contacts, companies, deals, tickets, pipelines, analytics, webhooks)"

+    "streaming",
+]
+format = "wasi"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "singleton_writer"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "Stores webhook subscription IDs with idempotency keys, pagination cursors for incremental CRM sync, and last-seen event timestamps per object type."

+    "z:owner",
+    "z:private",

+forbidden = [
+    "z:public",

+[capabilities]

+[manifest]
+format = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
+min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
+protocol_features = []
+max_datagram_bytes = 65000
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:b480f9e8abfedf5703226f15ee12a2de143ca468a3ababd2a4614ba9d3d9bdd8"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.microsoft365"
+name = "Microsoft 365 Connector"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "FCP connector for Microsoft 365 via Microsoft Graph API (Outlook mail, OneDrive files, Calendar events, To Do tasks, OneNote notes, Excel/Word Online)"
+archetypes = [
+    "knowledge",
+    "operational",
+    "streaming",
+    "storage",
+]
+format = "wasi"
+
+[connector.state]
+model = "singleton_writer"
+state_schema_version = "1"
+migration_hint = "Stores Graph API delta tokens for incremental sync, webhook subscription IDs with expiry timestamps, and per-resource change cursors."
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = [
+    "z:owner",
+    "z:private",
+    "z:work",
+]
+allowed_targets = [
+    "z:work",
+    "z:private",
+]
+forbidden = [
+    "z:public",
+    "z:community",
+]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = [
+    "network.dns",
+    "network.egress",
+    "network.tls.sni",
+    "storage.state",
+    "media.download",
+    "media.upload",
+]
+optional = ["network.tls.mtls"]
+forbidden = [
+    "system.exec",
+    "network.listen",

+[manifest]

+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.n8n"
+name = "n8n Connector"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "FCP connector for n8n workflow automation (workflows, executions)"
+archetypes = ["operational"]
+format = "wasi"

+[connector.state]

+state_schema_version = "1"

+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = [
+    "z:owner",
+    "z:private",
+    "z:work",
+]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+forbidden = [
+    "z:public",
+    "z:community",
+]
+
+[capabilities]
+required = [
+    "network.dns",
+    "storage.state",
+]
+optional = ["network.egress"]
+forbidden = [
+    "system.exec",
+    "network.listen",
+    "media.upload",
+    "media.download",
+]
